commands.narrative:
## Roster Diff

No roster changes since yesterday (111 strategies on both days). All 8 proposed action items from 2026-05-27 remain open with two exceptions: the PIPELINE_STALLED item resolves as EXECUTED (826 trades processed yesterday, pipeline HEALTHY at report time), and the v32/v33/v34 kill recommendation is marked DEFERRED — those strategies have reversed course and now pass the drop_top3 gate.

## Headline

**The bot-excl-climbing family delivered a strong session: three strategies now pass all 4 promotion gates, including v32 which was a kill candidate 24 hours ago.** The pipeline processed 826 trades yesterday with no structural issues. Today shows 0 trades at report generation time (~700s since last graduation — quiet pump.fun period, not a bot failure).

## What Accumulated, What Bled

Top earners by lifetime total (from leave-one-out-pnl.json, deduped to shadow mode):

- **v25-bot-excl-climbing** (shadow, n=361): +6.120 SOL total, drop3=+3.807 SOL, 13.24 SOL/mo → most robust edge in the portfolio
- **v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp** (shadow, n=224): +5.142 SOL total, drop3=+1.776 SOL, 17.79 SOL/mo → highest monthly run rate
- **v32-bot-excl-climbing-1s** (shadow, n=180): +3.163 SOL total, drop3=+0.851 SOL, 13.56 SOL/mo → **newly cleared all 4 gates today** (score=100)
- **v33-bot-excl-climbing-ttp5** (shadow, n=182): +3.183 SOL total, drop3=+0.522 SOL, 13.64 SOL/mo → borderline promotable (score=91.9)
- **v34-bot-excl-climbing-minlift** (shadow, n=184): +3.729 SOL total, drop3=+0.363 SOL, 15.98 SOL/mo → thin drop3 margin (score=88.3)

Worst bleeder: **v35-vel2050-holders10** at -3.641 SOL total (n=99), -15.61 SOL/mo. **v35-vel2050-top10-40** at -2.603 SOL (n=100). Both deeply INVALID — carry-forward kill recommendation.

## Cross-Day Pattern: v32/v33/v34 Reversal

Yesterday's session flagged v32/v33/v34 for kill at n=150–154 when all three had negative drop_top3 (lottery-trade dominated). At n=180–184, all three have flipped positive: drop3 = 0.851 / 0.522 / 0.363 respectively. The interpretation: the burst of big-win trades that created the apparent lottery concentration at n≈150 has been sufficiently diluted by subsequent real-edge trades. v32 is now the cleanest of the three (drop3=0.851, score=100) and qualifies as a full promote candidate alongside v25 and v28. v33 and v34 are borderline — recommend watching for another 14 days before promoting.

## Edge Decay Signals

Multiple strategies are flagged DECAYING in today's anomalies (recent-30 median has widened vs. all-time median):
- v12-vel2050-liq-dd15: recent-30 median -15.75% vs all-median -4.45%
- v37-whale-conviction: -10.08% vs -4.62%
- v14-sumabs-dd-shadow: -10.64% vs -4.94%
- v14-sumabs-shadow (already INVALID on financial gates): -10.64% vs -5.4%
- v20-vel2050-dd-tight: -30.02% vs -20.22%

These are distribution-shape diagnostics — DECAYING here means the recent-30 median is worsening, not necessarily that total_net_sol is declining. Cross-check with leave-one-out-pnl confirms v14 and v20-tight are already INVALID on financial gates regardless. v12 is worth monitoring (drop3=-1.802, n=56 — still WATCH but trending negative).

## v9 Trio — Pacing WATCH

v9shadow-velmono-dev (n=66, monthly=3.76, drop3=1.612): just clearing the 3.75 monthly bar and positive drop3 — the most promising of the three. v9shadow-vel20-top5 (n=76, monthly=3.51, drop3=0.164) and v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono (n=68, monthly=3.46, drop3=0.498): both below the monthly bar, need n≥100 and further accumulation. All three are WATCH — do not kill, do not promote.

## Operator Next Step

**Execute the promotion batch**: v25-bot-excl-climbing and v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp have been PROPOSED since yesterday; v32-bot-excl-climbing-1s is newly cleared today. Promote all three (or start with v25+v28 as yesterday proposed, add v32 this cycle). Also action the kill queue: v10-best-double, v14-sumabs-shadow, v35-vel2050-holders10, v35-vel2050-top10-40, and v25-bot-excl-climbing-live-micro are all INVALID and consuming slots.

anomalies.detail: Strategy v12 vel 20-50 + liq>100 + max_dd>-15 @ 150/30 (panelv3_8 star) (v12-vel2050-liq-dd15) flagged DECAYING — recent-30 median -15.75% vs all median -4.45%.
Strategy v37 Whale conviction (whale≥0.25 + buyers≤15) (v37-whale-conviction) flagged DECAYING — recent-30 median -10.08% vs all median -4.62%.
Strategy v14 sumabs + dd protection (vel<20+top5<10%+sum_abs<60+dd>-10 @ 100/30) (v14-sumabs-dd-shadow) flagged DECAYING — recent-30 median -10.64% vs all median -4.94%.
Strategy v14 sumabs mirror (vel<20+top5<10%+sum_abs<60 @ 100/30) (v14-sumabs-shadow) flagged DECAYING — recent-30 median -10.64% vs all median -5.4%.
Strategy v20 vel 20-50 + dd>-7% @ 150/30 gate5-100 (tighter dd) (v20-vel2050-dd-tight) flagged DECAYING — recent-30 median -30.02% vs all median -20.22%.
"V29.3 v9-vel20-top5 + UTC 02-10 [shadow]" (V29.3) — no trade in 51h. Selective filters; pipeline confirmed feeding (see skip-reason panel).
"V30.2 v9-vel20-top5 + BTC<=+0.08% [shadow]" (V30.2) — no trade in 10h. Selective filters; pipeline confirmed feeding (see skip-reason panel).
"V30.3 v10-best-double + BTC<=+0.08% + F&G>=25 [shadow]" (V30.3) — no trade in 18h. Selective filters; pipeline confirmed feeding (see skip-reason panel).

patterns: v32/v33/v34 bot-excl-climbing variants all flipped drop_top3 positive between n=154 and n=180 — dilution effect, not signal reversal.
bot-excl-climbing family now has 3 strategies with score=100 (v28, v32, v25) — concentrated in one filter thesis.
v14-sumabs family decaying on recent-30 median while already INVALID on financial gates — consistent with structural edge loss.
v9 trio (n=66-76) pacing steadily toward n=100 with positive drop3 on velmono-dev — strongest v9 watch candidate.
v35 vel 20-50 overlay (holders/top10 concentration screens) deeply negative — concentration filters appear anti-predictive in current regime.

promote.reason: All 4 gates clear: n=361, drop_top3=+3.807 SOL (robust), total=+6.120 SOL, monthly=+13.24 SOL/mo. Score=100. Most diversified sample in the climbing family — recommend as primary promotion target.

All 4 gates clear: n=224, drop_top3=+1.776 SOL (improved from +0.343 yesterday), total=+5.142 SOL, monthly=+17.79 SOL/mo. Score=100. 1s poll + 10% trailing TP variant — highest monthly run rate in portfolio.

All 4 gates clear: n=180, drop_top3=+0.851 SOL, total=+3.163 SOL, monthly=+13.56 SOL/mo. Score=100. edge_flag=STRENGTHENING. NEW promotable today — was kill candidate at n=154 (drop3 negative), now fully cleared at n=180.

n=109, total=-1.211 SOL, drop_top3=-2.694 SOL. INVALID on all gates. DECAYING anomaly (recent-30 median worsening). Carry-forward from 2026-05-27.
live_micro mode: total=+0.124 SOL, drop_top3=-0.211 SOL. INVALID (drop3 negative at live capital). Recommend disabling live exposure — shadow variant is the correct test vehicle.
n=99, total=-3.641 SOL, drop_top3=-6.082 SOL, monthly=-15.61 SOL/mo. INVALID on all gates — deeply negative. Will hit n=100 tomorrow; pre-emptive kill.

n=184, drop_top3=+0.363 SOL (thin), monthly=+15.98 SOL/mo, score=88.3. drop3 margin thinner than v33 — WATCH until margin widens or further dilution confirms edge.

action_items.summary: Promote v32-bot-excl-climbing-1s — score=100, n=180, drop_top3=+0.851 SOL, monthly=+13.56 SOL/mo. All 4 gates clear. edge_flag=STRENGTHENING. NEW promotable today (was kill candidate at n=154).

commands.action_item_note: Pipeline HEALTHY at 2026-05-28 report time — 826 trades processed yesterday, all 4 diagnostic levels pass, last graduation 700s ago (quiet pump.fun period, not a bot failure). PIPELINE_STALLED was transient.

Kill recommendation reversed: at n=180-184, v32 drop3=+0.851, v33 drop3=+0.522, v34 drop3=+0.363 — all three have flipped positive since the n=150-154 snapshot. v32 (score=100) is now a PROMOTE candidate (see ai-2026-05-28-001). v33 and v34 are borderline WATCH. Do NOT kill these strategies.
